summary: DiskWise now alerts you when any drive runs low on space or when system health drops to Poor, with one-tap memory cleanup actions.
introduced: Disk space alerts — notifications when any mounted drive falls below 15% free or below twice your RAM, with an Open Disk Analysis action
Poor health alerts — notifications when the health score drops below 40, with memory cleanup suggestions and Free Memory / Open System Optimization actions
Settings toggles for disk space alerts and poor-health alerts under Menu bar monitor (both on by default)
changed: SystemVolumeMonitor checks all mounted drives on each refresh and respects a 30-minute per-drive cooldown
SystemHealthMonitor triggers poor-health notifications on refresh, with a 20-minute cooldown and faster re-alert when the score drops further
Memory Analyzer notification handler routes disk space and system health notification taps alongside existing memory insight actions
